calendar.matters:
Attorney-In-Fact'S Petition For Order Authorizing Establishment Of Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Dec-31-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deborah Fox for Regunath Dindial. Deborah Bolle (Special Needs Beneficiary) in propria persona.

The Court stated that it had reviewed the Special Needs Trust and all appeared to be in order. Ms. Bolle stated that she understood and agreed with the provisions stated in the trust regarding the Trustee (Son) not being bonded and the accountings not being required. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Aquino.
